app_id.desc: The ID of the app whose configuration you want to validate.

manifest.desc: The manifest to be validated. Will be validated against the app manifest schema - read our guide.

errors.app_not_eligible: The specified app is not eligible for this API.
errors.app_not_owned_by_manager_app: The app is not owned by the manager app.
errors.failed_adding_collaborator: Failed writing a collaborator record for this new app
errors.failed_creating_app: Failed to create the app model
errors.invalid_app: An app created from the provided manifest would not be valid.
errors.invalid_app_id: The app id passed is invalid.
errors.invalid_manifest: The provided manifest file does not validate against schema.
